name: Pancakes for Two
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda and salt.
2. In another bowl, mix together the buttermilk, oil and egg (if using).
3. Stir the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients until well combined.
4. Gently fold in the blueberries if desired.
5. Heat a griddle or pan over medium heat.
6. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter onto the hot surface for each pancake.
7. Cook until bubbles form on the surface of the pancakes and the edges are set.
8. Flip the pancakes using a spatula and cook until golden brown on the other side.
9. Yield: About 8 pancakes.
